productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Self Printed Cream Kurta
description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition Cream kurta with self print, made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with a red yoke extending from the shoulders along the neckline and tapering towards the chest, thread detailing on the yoke and in between the pin tucks on the chest, short sleeves with piping detail and print along the vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The stitch detailing on the yoke and large print at the hem adds zing to the garment. Team it with leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
